name: ExpenseFlow
description: Splitwise-inspired expense sharing platform supporting multiple expense splitting strategies, debt simplification, group management, settlements, and event-driven notifications using Strategy, Factory, Observer, and Singleton patterns.

name: Coupon System
description: Scalable discount and pricing engine supporting dynamic coupon rules, extensible pricing workflows, and rule chaining for e-commerce applications.

name: CloudStack Deploy
description: Designed and deployed containerized applications on AWS using modern cloud-native infrastructure and automated deployment workflows.

name: HackFusion
description: SEO-focused IT solutions platform that improved organic traffic and streamlined customer engagement through chatbot automation.

name: FitHub
description: Fitness management platform featuring workout tracking, user authentication, and performance analytics.

name: Chess Master
description: Real-time multiplayer chess platform featuring matchmaking, live gameplay synchronization, and interactive user experience.

name: Algorithm Visualizer
description: Interactive visualization platform demonstrating sorting algorithms through animations and real-time execution.
